entry.title: Re: Functional Currency differs from Company Code Currency
entry.content:
Dear

Using free define currency as a functional currency is very inconvenient.

unfortunately, S/4HANA Cloud does not allow to change company code currency, as it always the same as the official currency in which the country  it belongs.

However, in practice, some customers for example, HK companies require USD company code currency(functional currency) rather than HKD, they just created HK company codes under US country version.

The same may not be true in your scenario, but this approach may be worth considering and testing.

Regards,

Sen

entry.title: Re: "Configure" menu not visible in Integration Suite whe...
entry.content: @Charlie_Lin, check this https://johnytips-sap.blogspot.com/

entry.title: Configuration For Allowing Price Change in Service Entry Sheet
entry.content:
Hi, I am new in SAP. I am trying to change the service entry setting to allow for price changes.

1. Change in SPRO

SPRO > MM Materials Management > External Services Management > Define Screen Layout > Purchase Order > Price and Value Fields > Price chgble at service entry as an optional entry.

2. PO Creation

Create PO > Service Tab > Table Settings (table icon) > Administrator > Edit system settings > untick Price Change Allowed.

I am stuck here. I have saved all steps, but the column still does not appear in the service tab. When I try again, step by step, the changes are not saved.  I tried many times to save, but the result is still the same.

Anyone can help me?

entry.title: Project Budget Approval
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Our customer would like to have the a project budget workflow. Is there any solution in place to use for them?

Thanks,

Ignacio.

entry.title: Re: Web IDE Service Catalog
entry.content: This is the problem no drop down menu in service catalog

entry.title: Re: Stay certified - Is an SAP Learning Hub subscription...
entry.content: Hi, I just got my certification updated with my newly paid Learning Hub purchase, and it is VERY confusing and web pages are still inconsistently showing my status as either not certified, pending, or up to date, depending on which I go to. And this is unnerving with the upcoming expiration next week, because they also say I "still need to certify before too late!". But then if I use the right browser and reset cache enough times, usually MS Edge, it will show as up to date. I put in a case id Case ID 5000129447 and it did not help. I also lost 2 months of Learning Hub access because it took this much time to sort it out and I could not use in the meantime. I had asked someone to call me on the case, or get some assistance. I have been certifying since the 90s in SAP, and it is currently much more difficult than it ever was.

entry.title: Re: How to Call Web Service BusinessPartnerSUITEBulkRepli...
entry.content: You can take a look at standard DRF outbound implementation class like CL_MDG_BS_BP_REL_SERVICE_DRF to see how to call BP webservice in codes.

Jagadhatri

entry.title: Re: SAP GROW embeded TM - multi pick and multi drop scena...
entry.content:
Hi,

Transportation Management considers Incoterms during transportation planning for the purposes of stage building. TM uses Incoterm Location 1 to build freight unit stages. Kindly explore this option of Incoterm and Incoterm locations and check if you can model your scenario. 

Incoterms and Incoterm Locations | SAP Help Portal

Regards,

Saurabh Goyal

entry.title: Re: SAP GROW embeded TM - multi pick and multi drop scena...
entry.content:
Hi,

Transportation Management considers Incoterms during transportation planning for the purposes of stage building. TM uses Incoterm location 1 to build freight unit stages. Kindly check this option of Incoterm and Incoterm location to model your scenario and evaluate the requirement.

Incoterms and Incoterm Locations | SAP Help Portal

Regards,

Saurabh Goyal

entry.title: Re: Controller file for custom section to an object page using extensions

if you have any difficulties: please reach out to me in my local number 056 876 5658 or in WhatsApp : +65 9055 7406!

Hi Stefan,

If you hover your mouse over the measure, then it will show both the technical ID & description:

Hope this helps

Cheers, Ivan.

entry.title: Re: Cost Center Commitments in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi, I have made all the required configuration and uploaded the cost center budget. while posting the accounting document with more than the available budget system giving the Error message correctly but while creating the Purchase order with cost center and GL account system giving the Error message and also not updating in the commitment. 

Available control activated in the cost enter level but still commitments functionality not working.  can some once help me.

 

Best Regards,
Sreehari.

entry.title: Re: Reactive maintenance order w.r.t notification error (Work center does not exist)
entry.content: In the "Create Maintenance Order App", check what work center you have input on the header data, also go to the operations tab to check the work center there. Work Centers are a configurable field with a standard set of drop down values (assigned to maintenance plants), so if you have tried to manually type one in and made a spelling mistake, then the maintenance order won't save successfully.

entry.title: Re: Guidance Required on Fiori App F6991 – Project Cost O...
entry.content: Hi Ken, I've gone through numerous blogs and SAP Notes, but none of them seem to address my specific issue. Despite extensive research, I haven't found any mention of this problem, leaving me without a clear solution. Thanks

entry.title: Re: Report amount of employees access internal career por...
entry.content: Hi Sanjeet! Thank you for your comment!

entry.title: Encountering issues while activating the BP data model
entry.content:
Hi There,

While activating the BP data model, I encountered an error stating, "Field symbol has not been assigned yet." I added a custom entity to the BP model while the BP data model activation was in display mode. I deleted the custom entity and attempted to activate the model again, but the error is not resolved. I also removed locks for all users to check for any locked objects, but the error remains unresolved.

Details of the error:

  • Runtime error: GETWA_NOT_ASSIGNED
  • ABAP Program: CL_USMD_MDF_MODEL_GENERATOR===CP    

 

 Kind regards,

 Meghana.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Asset Management – Output Management using Work Packs
entry.content:
Hello Sir,

This is a Wonderful & Informative blog! However, for you, there are attachments available for Printing Job Cards, but for my Case, Attachments are 0, even though I have an attachment added in the Work Order Documents tab. This attachment is Visible for the Email Option. Would you be able to help with this, as in what is missing & needs to be done to automatically include the Attachments attached in the Work Order Documents tab, in the Job Card for Printing?

 

Thanks & Regards,
Tulika

entry.title: Re: Document Generation - A complete Guide Including Troubleshoot

Thank you for the detailed information.

Do we have any predefined templates in Document Generation Templates?

Ex : Offer letter format. Experience letter.

Kindly advice.

entry.title: Re: ASE 16 failed to start post Linux SUSE patch upgrade...
entry.content: Hi, is your ASE version 16.0 SP03? This looks like the known issue described in: https://me.sap.com/notes/3581984 You can revert the OS files to previous version(GLIBC version < 2.36) to start ASE. Then update the ASE to ASE16SP04PL06 or higher per Note 3425215.

entry.title: Unable to activate BP data model after creating an entity
entry.content: I am unable to activate BP data model after creating an entity . While activating the entity it is showing the error as "Field symbol is not assigned yet ". Later on I deleted the created entity and tried to activate it again it showed the same error so I debugged the code , but still the deleted entity is being read into the internal table. How can this be solved?

entry.title: Re: "Configure" menu not visible in Integration Suite whe...

entry.title: Re: In public cloud, when creating a Production Order ,ca...
entry.content:
Hello,

you cannot make the field mandatory via configuration.
You could use the Prod. Sched. Profile to activate the automatic creation of the batch. With this setting you can still put in a batch number manually but if the user does not do it, the system will do it based on the two possibilities.

Regards
Johannes

entry.title: Work Item Level Execution in DTV
entry.content:
Problem Statement

If you are already using DTV tool for business data validation, you may already know that DTV generates work items as per the split parameters provided in the test specifications.

Customers may sometimes get to a scenario where they wish to.

  • Execute individual or set of work items of their choice
  • Execute failed/ cancelled work items only

To address such requirements DTV tool introduces work item level execution in the new release DTV 1.6.

Work Items

With DTV 1.6 release onwards, the tool is introduced with new concept called work item level execution. For each Extraction/Simulation, the tool generates work items explicitly first and then the work item level execution happens for respective work items. In this way DTV facilitates smaller data extraction as well as if extraction for one or more work item fails/cancels, you can run the failed/cancelled work items explicitly which makes the overall DTV execution faster.

You can find the Generate Workitems buttons in both Simulation as well as Extraction screens as highlighted below.

Once the work items are generated by using the above button, the execution status changes to

You can see the generated work items in the Result tab.

Project Global Data and Work Items

In DTV project global data is used to split the business data into smaller chunks and the project global data is also applicable to all the reports. But it is worth to mention that the definition of project global data is directly related to number of work items that will be generated during the Extraction / Simulation phase.

In the below example of project global data, only one work item will be created.

However, it is always recommended to further split the project global data to generate multiple work items for smaller and faster simulation/extraction. Below is a simple example of further finetuning of the project global data.

Define Project Global data wisely to split the data into smaller chunks (work items)

You can define the project global data wisely by splitting, which in turn will create multiple work items. E.g. For the below project global data 5 work items will be generated.

Check the work items created in Result tab.

Once work items are generated you can execute the work items with different options as per your requirement

  • Execute all the work items together (by default)
  • You can select multiple work items as per your requirement and execute
  • You can also execute the failed or cancelled work items only

Select multiple work items and run

If you have generated multiple work items and you would like to execute only few, you have the possibility to select the desired work items and execute simulation or extraction.

Select failed work items and run

If there are failed or cancelled work items, you can simply select the failed work item and execute the simulation or extraction.

DTV Useful links

Business data validation using DTV tool

Best practices to follow during DTV implementation

3117879 - Data Transition Validation DTV Tool - Central Note

3569864 - DTV Tool 1.6 Delivery

entry.title: Extending Standard Fiori Apps in Visual Studio Code
entry.content: I am creating custom apps in Visual Studio Code, but I want to know how to handle standard Fiori apps in Visual Studio Code. As you know, in Fiori WebIDE, we can extend standard apps. How can we do the same in Visual Studio Code? Is there an option available to extend them?

entry.title: Re: Project Budget Approval
entry.content:
Hi Ignacio,

Unfortunately, it's not supported.

Please raise feature request.

The link for Influence for finance is  https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#campaign/1169

Best Regards,
Owen

entry.title: Re: How to perform the Product Update using Odata v4 in sap s4hana Cloud
entry.content: I am trying API_PURCHASEORDER_2 api, by setting if-match=*, but i am getting below error

entry.title: Re: How to perform the Product Update using Odata v4 in sap s4hana Cloud
entry.content: { "error" : { "code" : "RAP_RUNTIME/025", "message" : "Operation is not enabled", "@SAP__common.ExceptionCategory" : "Provider_Application_Error", "innererror" : { "ErrorDetails" : { "@SAP__common.Application" : { "ComponentId" : "MM-PUR-PO", "ServiceRepository" : "SRVD_A2X", "ServiceId" : "API_PURCHASEORDER_2", "ServiceVersion" : "0001" }, "@SAP__common.TransactionId" : "00259DEC28330250E0067E1CE3ED8F8D", "@SAP__common.Timestamp" : "20250325051959.444584", "@SAP__common.ErrorResolution" : { "Analysis" : "Use ADT feed reader \"SAP Gateway Error Log\" or run transaction /IWFND/ERROR_LOG on SAP Gateway hub system and search for entries with the timestamp above for more details", "Note" : "See SAP Note 1797736 for error analysis (https://service.sap.com/sap/support/notes/1797736)" } } } } }

entry.title: Re: IP30 layout
entry.content: Try IP30H. This transaction is for S/4 HANA and runs deadline monitoring a lot faster than IP30. You will also find there are a lot more fields to choose for variants including Planning Plant.

entry.title: BYD2502 Enable Withholding Tax
entry.content:
Dear SAP staff

We would like to use the withholding tax management function in Japan, but it is not localized.
We found the following blog post, but if we follow the steps in the blog, will it work?
We are asking because we could not find the list of Tax Basic Countries listed in the prerequisites.


Best PERSON_NAME,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: BYD2502 Enable Withholding Tax
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

 

Thank you for your query.

We’d like to clarify that Japan is one of the standard localized countries supported in SAP Business ByDesign. This means that withholding tax management is already available as part of the standard localization for Japan, and you do not need to follow the steps intended for non-localized countries.

The SAP Notes and blog post you referred to are applicable for countries that are not localized, so they are not necessary in your case.

If you are not seeing the relevant withholding tax options in your system, please let us know, and we’ll be happy to assist further.

Kindly have a look into the below SAP KBA: 

https://me.sap.com/notes/2814131

https://me.sap.com/notes/3388229

About Standard Localization 

In this version, SAP supports customers to run business with SAP Business ByDesign according to the international standards and local requirements. We support customers running their business in different countries/regions of the world by providing them with the legal standards and best practices of the country/region.

This includes the following features:

  • Functional Localization: Ensures that the solution enables legal compliance and follows the best practices.

  • Internationalization: Ensures that we support the specific local languages and cultures. Some of the generic features supported are Unicode, Currencies, Time Zones, Calendars, and Script Direction.

  • Translation: Ensures that we translate the SAP Business ByDesign solution into other languages, focusing on the user interface, and the documentation for certain languages.

 Currently SAP provides standard localization for 21 countries as follows:

Australia 
Austria 
Belgium 
Canada 
China 
Denmark 
France 
Germany 
India 
Israel 
Italy 
Japan 
Mexico 
Netherlands 
New Zealand 
South Africa
South Korea
Spain
Switzerland
United Kingdom
USA

Additional Resources : 

Blog: The value, boundaries and approach of pre-localized countries category at SAP Business ByDesign

SAP Business ByDesign help document: Localization

Work zone: Localization Toolkit; Localization_Tax_Basic_Countries/Regions.pdf

Community: SAP Business ByDesign Localization

 

Best Regards

Pooja

entry.title: Re: We need the provision for FB01 & F-48

Thanks for your reply,

entry.title: Re: 🇦🇪 SAP CodeJam: Connecting systems and services using SAP Integration Suite (Dubai, UAE)
entry.content: Sorry : it’s level 23

entry.title: EarlyWatch Alertの送信先メールアドレス変更の手順
entry.content:
How to change the e-mail address in EWA configuration page step 5 Maintain Recipients?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: EarlyWatch Alertの送信先メールアドレス変更の手順
entry.content:
There are 2 ways to change the e-mail address.
1.update the e-mail address of the current user
2.It is assumed the recipients used have already been maintained in the Global Recipients List. However, you can at this point add new email recipients in the Global Recipients List , and then add them to the Maintain Recipients step. If you would like to add an external user of solman system, you can click Maintain Global Recipients -> External tab -> Add Recipients ->Input name and email then click Add button ->Go back to step 5 Maintain Recipients -> click Add button to finish all the steps -> In case you could not find the user you would like to add, use the filter by clicking ID/Display name in step 3 Assign Recipients.
Refer:2282944 - EarlyWatch Alert: Solution Manager 7.2 How to Setup / Configure EWA Reports or Add Email Recipients

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: MDK Grid table converting into Object page on iPad Air 11 inch , is this a bug?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have implemented a Grid Table for 3 columns but this gets converted into Object table on my new iPad air 11inch. I understand that Grid table will be converted into Object table for phones however for iPads it should not, right? Am I doing something wrong or is this a bug ? 

Also, Is there a way to change the Ancestor icon on iOS? I want that to be like a deletion button.. Thanks!

Here is the simplest code I tried:

{
    "Controls": [
        {
            "_Type": "Control.Type.SectionedTable",
            "_Name": "SectionedTable0",
            "Sections": [
                {
                    "_Type": "Section.Type.GridTable",
                    "Target": {
                        "Service": "/Test/Services/Mobile_Test.service",
                        "EntitySet": "ZC_Test_REFERENCE_SOURCE"
                    },
                    "_Name": "SectionGridTable0",
                    "Visible": true,
                    "EmptySection": {
                        "FooterVisible": false
                    },
                    "Separators": {
                        "TopSectionSeparator": false,
                        "BottomSectionSeparator": true,
                        "HeaderSeparator": true,
                        "FooterSeparator": true,
                        "ControlSeparator": true
                    },
                    "Row": {
                        "Items": [
                            {
                                "NumberOfLines": 1,
                                "Text": "Item",
                                "TextAlignment": "Left"
                            },
                            {
                                "NumberOfLines": 1,
                                "Text": "Item",
                                "TextAlignment": "Left"
                            },
                            {
                                "NumberOfLines": 1,
                                "Text": "Item",
                                "TextAlignment": "Left"
                            }
                        ],
                        "Layout": {
                            "ColumnWidthPercentage": [
                                0.33,
                                0.33,
                                0.33
                            ]
                        },
                        "AccessoryType": "None"
                    },
                    "DataPaging": {
                        "ShowLoadingIndicator": false,
                        "PageSize": 50
                    }
                }
            ],
            "FilterFeedbackBar": {
                "ShowAllFilters": false,
                "_Type": "Control.Type.FilterFeedbackBar"
            }
        }
    ],
    "_Type": "Page",
    "_Name": "test2",
    "ActionBar": {
        "Items": [],
        "_Name": "ActionBar1",
        "_Type": "Control.Type.ActionBar"
    }
}

entry.title: Re: In public cloud, when creating a Production Order ,ca...

entry.title: Re: How to retrieve single record in cloud functions in sap build apps
entry.content:
Hi Pekka,

Thanks! That is actually the workaround I did. However, I used a data variable to retrieve instead of using the get list function in vcf. I'm having issues with the get list function returning an "unexpected error" and then no other information. Would you know what's causing this and/or where can I go to troubleshoot this some more? Like some logs, stacktrace, etc?

Below are screenshots of a test page I created to demo. Page contains a button, upon click will run the cloud function 'test func' and will show an alert dialog box if success or error. Another screenshot for the implementation of 'test func'.

Opening dev console, this is the response when clicking the button

{
    "status": 200,
    "statusText": "OK",
    "headers": {
        "access-control-allow-origin": "*",
        "allow": "OPTIONS,GET,HEAD,POST,PUT,PATCH,DELETE",
        "access-control-allow-headers": "content-type, authorization",
        "access-control-allow-methods": "OPTIONS,GET,HEAD,POST,PUT,PATCH,DELETE",
        "access-control-allow-credentials": "true",
        "strict-transport-security": "max-age=63072000; includeSubDomains; preload",
        "content-security-policy": "default-src 'none'",
        "content-type": "application/json; charset=utf-8",
        "date": "Tue, 25 Mar 2025 05:40:06 GMT",
        "x-envoy-upstream-service-time": "9",
        "server": "istio-envoy",
        "connection": "close"
    },
    "responseText": "{\"id\":\"7267fe0a-6431-4c2a-85de-f120bab6a8e7\",\"functionId\":\"8424c4b6-96af-4601-84b3-0b2a594e4f8b\",\"inputs\":{},\"startedAt\":\"2025-03-25T05:40:06.849Z\",\"completedAt\":\"2025-03-25T05:40:06.850Z\",\"terminationRequested\":false,\"output\":{\"id\":\"unexpectedError\",\"kind\":\"error\",\"values\":{}}}"
}

entry.title: Re: Joule "not currently enabled for you" when following SAP Build Code Test Drive Mission
entry.content:
Hi, I got it working briefly, but when logging on to the SAP Business Application Studio the day after, I had the same issue again, "This feature is currently not enabled for you."

Here are the steps I did: 

  1. Log on to SAP Build
  2. Navigate to project and opened it
  3. Preparing dev environment message occurs
  4. SAP Business Application Studio opens
    • Project is there and works fine
    • Navigating to Joule menu -> "This feature is currently not enabled for you."

entry.content: Good summary

entry.title: Re: In public cloud, when creating a Production Order ,ca...
entry.content:
Hi, you need to go to "Manage your solution" - CBC - Configuration (see screenshot)

Regards Johannes

entry.title: Re: Ariba Guided Buying : PO creation in quality environment
entry.content:
in standard without customizations you cannot be connected to two ERP systems from one Ariba realm/system.

so you point interface towards quality or dev that's it.

if needed - it is possible to purchase a DEV realm if needed for additional price from SAP

entry.title: What’s New in DTV 1.6
entry.content:
DTV 1.6 is released and in this blog, you will find the key features regarding DTV 1.6. Following are the key features of DTV 1.6.

Pre-Delivered Content: Enhanced with additional reports

DTV 1.6 now supports 60+ SAP reports and transactions. Following reports are now newly added in the latest pre-delivered content.

The latest pre-delivered content file is DTV_content_V3.1.dtv

Check pre-delivered content Note for more information: 3258383 - DTV : SAP Pre- delivered Content

Custom namespace reports with ALV output are allowed to be validated within the tool

Starting DTV 1.6 release, along with Custom reports (Z&Y), the tool can also validate custom namespace reports. This feature has been an ask from many of our customers and with this release now custom namespace reports with ALV output types can be validated.

Integration of DTV with Business Transformation Cockpit to support Lean SDT

Along with System conversion and SAP S/4HANA updates/upgrades, DTV can also be used in case of Selective Data Transition (SDT) scenarios with its latest release DTV 1.6.

Performance improvements in Simulation, Extraction and Evaluation

In DTV 1.6 performance of each execution (Simulation, Extraction and Evaluation) is improved making the overall DTV execution faster.

Evaluation Summary screen is revamped with additional fields

Evaluation Summary screen is revamped with new additional fields such as Report Name, Report Description, Runtime, Overall Runtime, Overall Delay, Workitem runtime, Workitem Delay etc. which are useful for evaluation.

DTV related useful links and Notes

  • SAP Note 3117879 – Central SAP Note for DTV
  • SAP Note 3569864 – DTV Tool 1.6 Delivery
  • Help Documentation – Data Transition Validation
  • Business data validation using DTV tool - Blog post
  • Best practices to follow during DTV implementation
  • Work Item Level Execution in DTV

DTV 1.6 Bug Fixing Note

3581960 - DTV 1.6 - Bug Fixes

3584455 - Evaluation Bug Fix for RFBELJ00

yes 50 is the current intended limitation.

entry.title: Re: Can Ariba send POs to Non-enabled suppliers via Email...
entry.content:
technically if supplier does not register on Network and not take ownership of the account then you can consider such supplier a non-enabled one.. account is there on Network but nobody has any ownership of it.

these suppliers will keep receiving Purchase Orders to their email

entry.title: Re: CPI iFlow getting error: The metadata constraints '[P...
entry.content:
Hi @patrik_buransky ,

When testing, try without the PostingDate field as it's optional, or alternatively, include the PostingDate as '2025-03-25T00:00:00'. Both options should be valid solutions.
Additionally, I've observed that the PostingDate is being sent as '17423067770', which corresponds to 'Tue Jul 21 1970 15:44:27.770'. Ideally, it should be sent as '1742306777000', which represents 'Tue Mar 18 2025 14:06:17.000'.

Kind regards. Vijay

entry.title: Re: Performance based equipment task list with multiple intervals
entry.content:
Greetings,

maintenance strategies (IP11) are very flexible and you can have many different maintenance packages included. Furthermore you can include hierarchy in the packages so one takes precedence over the other. You can then use this maintenance strategy for multiple pieces of equipment.

Can you elaborate a bit further regarding "There are only 2 digits to display the interval of the maintenance plan." --> can you share a screenshot of your issue here.

Bets regards, M.

entry.title: Calculation View Features of 2025 QRC1
entry.content:
Within the time frame of 2025 Q1, several new calculation view features have been released in SAP Business Application Studio when connected to SAP HANA Cloud database QRC1. Some of these features are highlighted below. You can find examples that illustrate the individual features here. An overview of features of other releases can be found here.

Variables of Input Type Derived

With the new variable input type "Derived" filters can be constructed based on values that are returned in a tabular structure.

For example, a table function can serve as the source of all values that should be included in a filter. In the following screenshot a filter is constructed based on the returned values in column "filterValues" (2.) of tabular data source "filterTableNV" (1.). The filter is applied on column "city" (3.).

The resulting filter string could look like

 

"city" IN ( SELECT "filterValues" FROM "filterTableNV" )

 

 

The construction of the filter is the responsibility of the consuming analytics client and the user for executing the query requires privilege SELECT or EXECUTE for the tabular data source.
 
Use this option to flexibly construct filters at query execution time.
 

Copy Calculated/Restricted Columns and Input Parameters/Variables between Calculation Views

Calculated and restricted columns can be copied between different calculation views as long as the target node type matches the source node type.
Similarly, input parameters and variables can be copied.
 
If dependencies, such as used columns are missing in the target node a warning is shown and the dependency removed. If the dependency is mandatory the element has to be manually adapted.
 
More easily reuse your modelling developments across calculation views with this feature.
 

Clean Up Intermediate Data Preview Objects

Per default after using the intermediate data preview object option temporary objects for the intermediate data preview remain until the calculation view is redeployed. These objects can also be removed using the clean up option that is available during Data Preview With Other Database User:

Within this dialog the Clean Up option becomes available that allows to selectively remove remaining objects in the selected schema.

Remaining intermediate data preview objects prior to the database upgrade cannot be removed in this way and need a redeployment.

Remove remaining intermediate data preview objects after e.g., firefighting sessions

Choose Target Feature Version of a Project

Select which features should be available in the modeler for a given project. Only versions between the last frozen feature version and the current database release can be selected as target feature version. Selecting a feature version freezes it.

Use this option to keep available modeling features e.g., in development systems in sync with productive systems.

Support of Vector Engine Functions in Expressions

Vector engine functions such as VECTOR_EMBEDDING can now be used in expressions. VECTOR_EMBEDDING transforms data into a multidimensional vector based on a given model. Usage of the functionality requires the enablement of Natural Language Processing in the respective account.

Leverage the strength of HANA vector engine in expressions

Additional Execution Hints

With execution hint "conversion_result_type_downcast_after_aggregation" downcasting of currency converted measures to their target data type can be postponed until after the aggregation of the currency converted measure. This can be used to decrease rounding errors and to reduce resource consumption.

 

Execution hint "HIERARCHY_REMOVE_DUPLICATE_EDGES" controls whether duplicate edges that link a child node to the same parent node twice in a hierarchy are removed or not.

 
HIERARCHY_REMOVE_DUPLICATE_EDGES overwrites the default behavior. If set to TRUE also in case of shared hierarchies multiple edges are removed. If set to FALSE also in case of local hierarchies no removal of duplicate edges happens.
 
Increase control over calculation view execution by using hints if needed

I guess what Ricky means is, that it shall not be forgotten to pass the info of MRREASON within the structure BAPIEABLU as the info of meter reading reason is mandatory in the EABLG table. So this makes this field also mandatory in the BAPI usage.

Kind Regards

entry.title: Subcontracting with a sales order stock or a normal stock?
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a question regarding subcontracting, In standard subcontracting with MTO with production.

When sending a material to a subcontractor, do we use a standard stock or  a sales order stock , in my case we are sending a semi-finished material, and in that case, how the consumption is happening at the subcontractor, that is totally based on which stock we are sending, also please note that we are using configurable material.

My confusion is how the consumption is done if we are sending a sales order stock, do we need to create a specific storage location for each subcontractor?

entry.title: Re: How to Call Web Service BusinessPartnerSUITEBulkRepli...
entry.content:
Hello, 

1.)

how to modify Webservice note during CR Rejected. 

With the above ask I guess you want to alter the contents of Note property which we have under Log node/entity of BusinessPartnerSUITEBulkReplicateConfirmation_Out , if yes then utilize the below BADI's Method which get triggered when the BP is successfully replicated and the Confirmation is set to the caller system.

BADI: MDG_SE_BP_BULK_REPLRQ_IN

Method: IF_MDG_SE_BP_BULK_REPLRQ_IN~OUTBOUND_PROCESSING

the above Structure has the LOG node in that.

2.) 

So, how to call this BusinessPartnerSUITEBulkReplicateConfirmation_Out Web service in System Caller Badi

ABAP Class "CO_MDG_BP_RPLCTCO" is the Internal ABAP Class(SE24) artefact for this WebService,

So try the same like below using "LOGICAL_PORT" you would have configured in the SOAMANAGER,

*DATA xxxxxxxx TYPE REF TO CO_MDG_BP_RPLCTCO.

TRY.
CREATE OBJECT xxxxxxxx
* EXPORTING
* destination =
* logical_port_name =
.
CATCH cx_ai_system_fault .
ENDTRY.

*TRY.
CALL METHOD xxxxxxxx->bp_suitebulk_replct_conf
EXPORTING
output =
.
* CATCH cx_ai_system_fault.
*ENDTRY.

Used the below option of ABAP Editor "Patterns" for getting the above code,

Give the above solutions a try.

Thanks,

Sijin

entry.title: Re: Integration Financial Plan in PPM and SAC Planning
entry.content:
Ok, got it. Did you have a look at the content package for Portfolio Financial Planning? 

This will only cover the financial planning part of portfolio management and facilitate a alignment of the top-down/bottom-up planning. Values are planned in SAC and then transferred either directly to the top level WBS element of the PS project to S/4HANA or for further detailing the approved value to WBS elements, you can also leverage the models of the Integrated Financial Planning and then transfer the detailed values to S/4. With the import from S/4 the actual and plan cost from PS are being retrieved and visualized in the planning.

The package covers an example for a very lightweight planning process leveraging already existing PS projects. Things which you get out of portfolio management like support of the request phase in project where you do not yet have a PS project, structured decision gates, trigger of PS project creation etc. are not covered here. 

The integration resides purely on ACDOCP/A. This also means that there is no budget availability control for projects based on the planning. These values can only be used for comparison. If you want to leverage them for availability control, they would have to be copied over to the classic Budget. 

Hope this helps, you can also DM if you want to discuss in more detail. Andrea 

Since the transfer is ACDOCP

entry.title: Re: Group Report Doesn't Read Doc Type EE
entry.content:
Difficult to speculate based on the provided information. Normally data posted in general ledger accounting should be integrated with the release task to Group Reporting independent from accounting document types used.

Did you check: 

- ledger -> version assignment

- company code -> company ID -> consolidation unit

- GL account -> FS item assignment

entry.title: CAP messaging with IS Event Mesh
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I'm trying to connect CAP with Integration Suite Event Mesh (not advanced event mesh). https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/node.js/messaging#event-mesh-shared 

BTP Event Mesh and IS Advanced Event Mesh are working out of the box for sending and receiving messages. However the "normal" IS Event Mesh will only send messages.

When configuring a receiver it failes, because by default it tries to create the queue it connects to.

Looking in the file "/node_modules/@sap/cds/libx/_runtime/messaging/AMQPWebhookMessaging.js" there is actually a check on a "doNotDeploy" property, but it isn't passed along. What is the reason this isn't implemented? Just passing the options along, makes it work by adding the "doNotDeploy" to the package.json.

Any additional information to understanding why would be greatly appreciated 🙂 

/D

entry.title: Re: Joule in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - Setup Guide
entry.content:
hi nagesh , 

Thanks for the detailed blog.

i have a question

Background – We already have joule enable for our SuccessFactors ( global account (A) subaccount - A1) which is up and running .

We want to enable joule for our public cloud to leverage its capabilities. Please note our public cloud resides in another global account ( B )

 

Applicationglobal accountsubaccount
successfactorAA1
Public cloudBB1

Our query is that can we leverage the existing joule (SuccessFactors subaccount) or we have to run the booster on our public cloud global account(B).

Thanks in advance

@nageshcaparthy

i propose: Start OSS dialog. This is the best option to clarify your topic.

C.B.

entry.title: Re: Inheritance of responsible cost center in project bui...
entry.content:
Hello Mohammed, 

in my opinion you can easily go with a substitution for the wbs-elements. 

1. Tcode: OPSN | Create a new Substitution-Folder and a new Substitution-Step for wbs-element

2. Precondition should be: PRPS-STUFE (wbs-element level below your top-level-wbs-element) >= e.g. '2' 

3. Substitution: Your field PRPS-FKSTL is substituted by field RCJ_PRPSUP-FKSTL

3. Tcode: OPSA - Select the Substitution-folder name in the project profile and select the checkbox "autom. substitute at save" 

4. You have the configure the field control for your cost center field, that it is only mandatory for the top-level wbs-element (influenced by PRPS-STUFE)

Please correct me if I am wrong. 

I hope this helps. 

Best regards, 

Tobias

entry.title: Re: Error program EHS_WWI LABEL not registered
entry.content: Hello: was there any change on WWI level on this WWI server? a new WWI patch? If wwi is up and running: normally no such problem comes up. But e.g. Windows OS System change and othere reasons can change this. As mentioned by JuanCarlos: try to understand the System log Wish you the best C.B.

entry.title: Hello we have problems with Office Key user in CG54
entry.content:
Dear all

there is a system set up problem with SAP user and "office key" as assigned to the SAP user. And because of this the user can not find his/her "OfficeKey" number in transaction CG54.

There seems to exist several "correction" reports as delivered by SAP (i have found i believe three different variants). But we do not know: which of the several ABAP Routines will help.

E.g. problem is like: by using the "Name" you can not find the corresponding "SO key (in CG54) But by using SE16 you find the data (and chekcing the relevant SAP tables) and if you use the SO key as identified: You can use this to dispatch the SDS

We would like to ge rid of this problem. Seems to be a "system set up" problem.  Any idea?

C.B.

entry.title: Product view in APO does not display the transaction data for component supplied by receiving plant
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are having subcontracting activity in our set up. I am getting in the this scenario.

Entities: PLant - PT1, Vendor - VN1, FG - MAT1[subcontracting material], Component - CMP1.

Heuristics executed for MAT1 at PT1. Pur req generated to VN1. In the ECC system, 'Components' on 'Material Data' tab page of the Pur Req displays the compnent CMP1 to be supplied by PT1 to VN1. But same is not displayed on the Prodcut view for CMP1 - PT1 in APO system. Can some one help to get the details on CMP1 - PT1 transaction in the APO system?

Thanks & Regards

Piyush Ranpura

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hello,

I am not sure if I understand correctly? Do you want to print your production orders via batch jobs?
You can link the printing to your production order release event (Output parameter determination)
You can manually "Mass processing Production orders", but you cannot schedule this as a job. You have to run it manually.

If you really need to automate it, you could use a API to trigger the releaset from outside.

I hope this helps.
Regards Johannes

entry.title: Re: SAP Marketing Cloud Release 2402 is Here!
entry.content:
Hi @vervinckt_joyca ,

The utm parameters should be automatically stored on the interaction that you have in the form.

We just recently implemented some custom logic to copy the utm paramaters from the form fillout interaction into the lead that is triggered by the form fillout.

Kind Regards,

Markus

entry.title: Re: Functional area derived from cost center category?
entry.content:
Hello Sen,

Thank you for your response! I now understand that functional areas can be derived from multiple sources, including cost center categories, G/L accounts, manual journal entries, and cost center master data.

I have a follow-up question: If I explicitly enter a functional area in the migration template, will it override the one derived from the cost center category? Or does SAP follow a specific priority hierarchy when determining the final functional area assignment?

I’d really appreciate any insights on this to ensure correct data migration.

Looking forward to your response.

Hi Singh,

Zhehui

entry.title: Re: How to update a boolean field type using determinatio...
